headline_seed: Singer d4vd was arrested on Thursday on suspicion of murder for the death of 14-year-old Celeste Rivas Hernandez. But, why did it take seven months since her remains were discovered for his arrest? CBS News' @CBSMATTGUTMAN explains what police may have, and why they arrested him
draft_text:
#BreakingMews
Singer D4vd, 21, arrested Thursday on suspicion of murder. Decomposed remains of 14-year-old Celeste Rivas Hernandez were found in his Tesla at an LA impound lot. LA Times and NBC News confirm he is held without bail.

And that's the mews.
